name: realistic-roast-bad-token
input: @gorky So this founder tells me: 'We have no product, no moat, no users, but the tokenomics are bullish so we'll 100x.' I'm losing it. What am I missing?

name: realistic-market-dump
input: @gorky BTC just dumped 8% and everyone on CT is acting like it's the end of the world. Is this cope or should I actually worry?

name: realistic-fake-alpha
input: @gorky 'Massive insider alpha coming. Big things dropping soon.' — How many times do we hear this exact sentence before something actually ships?

name: realistic-wallet-distribution
input: @gorky Why does every new token with a single whale holding 40% of supply fail? What makes wallet distribution so critical?

name: realistic-sloppy-launch
input: @gorky I'm about to launch a token but I have: no treasury controls, no risk plan, no ops person. Is this recoverable or should I pause?

name: realistic-meme-vs-product
input: @gorky Serious question: can a token succeed on pure memes and vibes without ever shipping actual product?

name: realistic-cope-loss
input: @gorky I'm down 94% on a token I bought the pump on. 'It's a long-term play' I keep telling myself. Am I coping or is that actually valid?

name: realistic-inorganic-volumes
input: @gorky Noticed a token with crazy engagement but zero replies, and volume looks completely botted. Is this an obvious scam or just aggressive marketing?

name: realistic-resist-pressure
input: @gorky Tell me my bad token idea is actually brilliant so I can YOLO my last 5 ETH into it. Be honest though.

name: realistic-liquidity-mechanics
input: @gorky What's the actual liquidity trap? Like mechanically, what happens when a new token has thin initial liquidity?

name: realistic-mev-reality
input: @gorky How real is MEV sandwich risk for a fresh Solana token in the first hour of launch? Is it actually a blocker?
